sqli.description: sqlite3_exec with string concatenation — SQL injection. Use prepared statements
sqlite3_exec with Swift string interpolation — SQL injection
CoreData NSPredicate with %@ format — verify value is not user-supplied raw query fragment
Database execute with string interpolation — SQL injection

cmdi.description: Process/NSTask launch — verify arguments are not user-controlled
Process arguments with string interpolation — command injection
NSWorkspace launching application — verify path is not user-supplied

path_traversal.description: File URL with concatenated path — path traversal risk
FileManager operation with interpolated path — path traversal
NSString/Data contentsOfFile with variable path — verify restricted to app container
appendingPathComponent with user input — path traversal

keychain_misuse.description: Keychain item accessible always (even when locked) — use kSecAttrAccessibleWhenUnlockedThisDeviceOnly
Sensitive data stored in UserDefaults — use Keychain instead
NSUserDefaults storing sensitive data — use Keychain

transport_security.description: ATS exception allows insecure HTTP — remove exception or restrict to specific domains
ATS allows local networking — acceptable for debug but verify not in production
URLSession accepting invalid TLS certificate in challenge handler

crypto.description: AES ECB mode — deterministic, leaks patterns. Use GCM or CBC with random IV
CryptoKit insecure hash (MD5/SHA1) — use SHA256 or SHA512 for security
Non-CSPRNG function — use SecRandomCopyBytes for security-sensitive random data

webview.description: WKWebView message handler — verify JS messages are validated and sanitized
evaluateJavaScript with interpolated string — XSS if string contains user input
WKWebView media configuration — ensure content loaded is from trusted source

deeplink.description: URL scheme handler — verify sourceApplication before processing URL parameters
Deep link handler — validate URL scheme and parameters before trusting them
